metadata.name: Smart Office Building - HVAC Digital Twin

kpis.name: Total HVAC Power
kpis.formula: SUM(ahu-001.power, ahu-002.power, chiller-001.power, boiler-001.power, pump-chw-001.power, pump-hw-001.power)

kpis.name: Ventilation Adequacy
kpis.formula: % of zones meeting ASHRAE 62.1 minimum OA requirements

alerts.message: CO2 level elevated (850 ppm) in Conference Room B
alerts.cause: High occupancy (8 people) with ventilation not fully compensating
alerts.recommendedAction: Increase VAV damper position or reduce occupancy

alerts.message: Temperature deviation (74.4°F vs 71°F setpoint) in Conference Room B
alerts.recommendedAction: Check VAV operation and zone load

alerts.message: Critical CO2 level (1408 ppm) in Conference Room B
alerts.recommendedAction: Immediately increase ventilation or evacuate space

faultRules.name: High CO2 Level
faultRules.recommendedAction: Increase outside air damper or VAV minimum flow

faultRules.name: Critical CO2 Level
faultRules.recommendedAction: Immediately increase ventilation or evacuate space

faultRules.name: Temperature Deviation
faultRules.description: Zone temp deviates more than 3F from setpoint for 15+ minutes
faultRules.recommendedAction: Check VAV operation and zone load

faultRules.name: Stuck VAV Damper
faultRules.description: VAV damper position unchanged despite load changes
faultRules.condition: damper.position unchanged for 30min AND zone.temp deviation > 2F
faultRules.recommendedAction: Inspect VAV actuator and damper linkage

faultRules.name: Sensor Drift Detected
faultRules.description: Sensor reading differs significantly from adjacent/reference sensors

faultRules.name: Fan Power Anomaly
faultRules.description: Fan power higher than expected for current airflow
faultRules.recommendedAction: Check for filter loading, duct obstructions, or fan degradation
